title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 30 April 2024.

items.title: Todd Howard says Bethesda is focused on finding ways to increase its output
bullets: The company hasn't ruled out partnering with external developers on future games
Remedy’s Control multiplayer game has entered full production: https://www.videogameschronicle.com/news/remedys-control-multiplayer-game-has-entered-full-production/
"The core loop is engaging, and the game brings a unique Remedy angle to the genre"
Tekken 8’s second DLC character and upcoming free updates have been revealed: https://www.videogameschronicle.com/news/tekken-8s-second-dlc-character-and-upcoming-free-updates-have-been-revealed/
Lidia from Tekken 7 will be joining the game in the Summer
Amazon's Fallout TV show was watched by 65m people in its first two weeks: https://www.eurogamer.net/amazons-fallout-tv-show-was-watched-by-65m-people-in-its-first-two-weeks
Second biggest Amazon show (behind Rings of Power)
Amazon hasn't qualified what it considers a viewer in its figures, so it's unclear how much of the series any of those counted have actually watched.

items.title: Tencent has increased its shareholding in Remedy to almost 15%
bullets: The Chinese tech giant has tripled its shares in Remedy since late 2022
Manor Lords sells 1m copies in 24 hours: https://www.eurogamer.net/manor-lords-sells-1m-copies-in-24-hours-reveals-whats-coming-next
